summary: Iteration 41 - All requested features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All pages and features work correctly.

recurring_validations.POST /api/recurring-validations: PASS - Creates validation with recurring_id and month
recurring_validations.validation_requires_fields: PASS - Returns 400 if missing recurring_id or month

transaction_deletion_simplified.manual_transaction_no_exclusion: PASS - Deleting manual transaction does NOT create exclusion
transaction_deletion_simplified.recurring_transaction_creates_exclusion: PASS - Deleting transaction matching recurring template creates exclusion

kpi_details_endpoint.GET /api/monthly-kpis/{month}/details: PASS - Returns recurring_validations and validated_this_month flag

challenges_api.GET /api/challenges/{id}: PASS - Returns challenge with participants and checkins_goal

recurring_validation_section.section_exists: PASS - 'VALIDATION MENSUELLE DES RÉCURRENCES' section visible
recurring_validation_section.validation_items: PASS - Shows 'loyer Hybrid' with 'NON VALIDÉ' button

details_tab_validation.recurring_section: PASS - Shows 'loyer Hybrid' with GENERE and VALIDER buttons
details_tab_validation.validate_button: PASS - Found validate button in recurring section

features_verified.1_fast_cash_revenue_removed: PASS - Fast Cash Revenue no longer shown as separate box in Details tab (verified in iteration 40)
features_verified.2_bilans_renamed: PASS - Page shows 'Bilans / Suivis' in header and sidebar
features_verified.3_bilans_filters: PASS - Clicking 'À venir', 'Cette semaine', 'En retard' filters work
features_verified.7_recurring_validation_ui: PASS - Month picker and 'Valider' button shown in Récurrentes page
features_verified.8_manual_delete_no_exclusion: PASS - DELETE manual transaction does NOT create exclusion
features_verified.9_recurring_delete_creates_exclusion: PASS - DELETE recurring-matched transaction creates exclusion

seed_data_creation: Tests use existing data (loyer Hybrid 7700 CHF recurring, Challenge Hiver 2024)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 41 verified: (1) Recurring validations API working (create/get/delete), (2) Bilans page renamed from Reviews with working filters, (3) Recurring validation section in both Récurrentes page and Details tab, (4) Transaction deletion simplified - manual transactions don't create exclusions. The 'Challenge Hiver 2024' has 0 participants so per-participant bilan status section not testable - would need to add participants to test. The loyer Hybrid recurring (7700 CHF) is the only active recurring transaction.
